title: lycianthes laevis subsp. subtruncata
intro: Lycianthes laevis subsp. subtruncata, also known as the 'small purple flowered Lycianthes', is a subspecies of flowering plant in the nightshade family Solanaceae. This plant is native to the subtropical regions of South America and is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lycianthes laevis subsp. subtruncata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
